content.problemStatement: You are given a string of size $N$. Count the number of distinct characters in it.
constraints:
- $1 \leq N \leq 100$
- All characters of the strings are lowercase alphabet.
content.inputFormat:
- The first line of each test case contains an integer $N$ — the size of string. 
- The next line contains a string of size $N$.
content.outputFormat: - Output on a new line the number of distinct characters in string.

sampleTestCases.explanation: String `abdadcdca` has only 4 distinct characters in it: `a`, `b`, `c` and `d`.
